review_title: Great tech support from [sensitive content hidden]
author: Jordan R.
pros: The customer service and technical support is lightyears beyond any other software I've used. I have always chatted with a live person, and never waited longer than 20-30 seconds. [sensitive content hidden] has consistently been able to provide every answer I've needed.
cons: Not much, but since you require a minimum of one hundred characters just to fill out the form, here you go.

review_title: Outstanding Report Writing Tool for Professional Report Writers
description: My company, AEI, has developed some really effective templates. There are things I wish I could improve, like hyphenating words, so I don't have to stop every time to do it. But that should be fixed by the person building the template and is not a failing of the software. Parcel is a very powerful report writing tool, but now Quire has exceeded it in ease-of-use.
author: Rick G.
pros: I love Quire. I have been using it for almost 10 years and have written several hundred reports on it. I was trained on Parcel but migrated over to Quire many years ago. But Qiure is only as good as the templates that are put into it. If the templates are junk and not well thought out, the program will be difficult to use. But that's not Quire's fault. I especially appreciate Quire's constant efforts to improve the product. I don't use a lot of the enhancements, but I know they are there. I also really appreciate Quire's customer service. Like most report writers, I work at odd hours, and every single time I've had an issue with Quire, and there haven't been many, Quire has always responded quickly and gotten me working again. I can't even describe how valuable that is. I also really like how I can leave comments in every section of the report for my Reviewer.
cons: Very little. Sometimes the program locks up or certain screens won't drop down, but that may be a problem with my computer and not with Quire.
author_profession: Associate Consultant- Seismic, former National Client Manager

description: Overall, Quire has worked out great for our report prep. It’s helped us cut through a lot of the repetitive information that used to slow us down. It basically just cleans up the process and saves us a lot of hours every week.
author: Corey K.
pros: Our company switched to Quire for our reporting and inspection workflow several years ago, and it's worked out well. The platform is easy to learn and easy to use. Utilizing Quire has saved our company so much time.
cons: It’s already good, but adding a few more specific features would take the user experience to the next level. There’s still some room to make things even more seamless.

description: Great tool for writing technical reports. Overall easy to use in the field on tablet and on the desktop.
author: Lawrence W.
pros: Ease of use in the field. Not needing a wi-fi connection at all times in the field and are able to upload once you do have wi-fi. Also love how photos are saved in app as well as the camera roll.
cons: The latest app. The photo button on the iPad in the center instead of the right side makes taking photos of measurements very difficult. Also the first letter of each word on photo captions are not capitalized. Have to manually do it on every photo. It is capitalized when using speak to text.

description: very positive. I've found that it is much better than our older system of just using word and saving various copies. Your team has been helpful whenever we have a problem, and the quire help/chat feature is nice and I've always had a very positive experience with your team.
author: Victor D.
pros: Ease of use. Multiple users can use at the same time. Can customize templates.
cons: Site maps are a little wonky. The map drawing tools aren't very intuitive and it can be glitchy.

review_title: Quire review from a report Reviewers perspective.
description: Good overall. Occasionaly there is odd spacing in the PDF versions. I like the ability to click on the menu on the left to go to sections.
author: Martha P.
pros: The track changes and comments to the left allow reviewers to comment and communicate with report writers within the program.
cons: The component pricing library. I would like to see it be a document for review instead of just key word driven. Key words are not always used by every report writer. So it does not always provide the correct information. If it was just a document we could upload and the writers could view they could pick the information they need.

description: Very positive. Everyone is very helpful and willing to resolve issues.
author: Robert T.
pros: Very simple to use. Customer support is excellent.
cons: Slow at times. Sometimes hierarchy issues.

description: Great, After completing initial onboarding we were able to relatively quickly scale up our Quire use to other reports within our company.
author: Jayson M.
pros: Ease of use, from author, reviewer, template architect, to system admin Continuous improvements to the product New User Dashboard upgrades Portfolio view and tools Great Customer Service including live chat help, comprehensive help page and regular customer check in meetings New Mobile app version very easy to use especially efficient for smart table completion.
cons: Lack of a Company type dashboard / Project management view similar to portfolio view Export tools for portfolios Export tools for combo reports i.e. ESA to PCA lack of ability to pick specific appendix items and copy to other report.

description: Overall positive experience with helpful people in chat.
author: Eric W.
pros: Ease of editing reports and setting up projects
cons: Issues with mobile app using smart tables, difficult to reach someone by phone when in field.

description: The Chat is so great - fast and smart; I have used it several times and learned a lot and the chat agent resolves my problems
author: Rae B.
pros: Leveled up our reports, helping us with internal consistency, and increasing our productivity; help section is very accessible
cons: has a bit of a learning curve; and I wish we could collapse subsections so the navigation panel isn't so overwhelming
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Glad to have this wonderful tool
description: For the industry I am in Project Assessor the final product when completed is GOLD for your readers, owners' buyers etc.
author: Marc L.
pros: The tools are endless. Easy to navigate. It makes writing a report very simple and user friendly. You can Edit at any time
cons: Not much to say about cons. When deleting with provided information I must find a way if there is one to go back to original options.

review_title: What Quire has done for me and could do for you!
description: If you couldn't tell already, I'm a huge fan. I've utilized Quire for approximately 3 years now and it truly helps with work efficiency. Glad to be working with the platform, and happy to provide some positive feedback when it's much deserved!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I tend to find my Word Document projects slower, and this helps save me so much time. Aside from the extremely user friendly interface, the biggest pro I will note is that I appreciate how multiple people can tackle huge projects all at the same time if necessary! In addition, I personally find the aspects of commenting, highlighting, being able to import situational word banks in, checking off completed sections, unchecking sections if you are a reviewer, and more to be extremely helpful. I note this because when you are completing a project that needs to be generated into a pdf you can expect the following: Your comments will be hidden away; your differently colored text (often used to indicate what needs to be changed) is automatically changed to black; and your highlighted portions remain which is great for pdf review so that you can see if you still need to make edits somewhere, or can be used for portions where a manager may prefer to make minor alterations in PDF.
cons: I would say that the trait about Quire that I like the least currently is mainly based around human error on our end rather than Quires. However, we utilize EDR Lightbox for all of our Phase I ESA Reports and we use the "external orders" portion. This generates the data directly into the current Quire template, which is immensely helpful most of the time. The only times this doesn't work the best is when someone does a pre-limary type of report where our templates are still Word based; or when someone accidentally uploads the wrong template and we externally order through this. Again, this is all more or less circumstance and/or human error on our end. But, if we could get a way to import the external orders from Lightbox into a full report or new template, then that would be amazing.

review_title: It's been great and heading towards better
description: It has been a great experience, it has smoothed out some of the major pain points in reporting and slowdowns.
author: Arturo M.
pros: Consistent reports and formatting which lead to faster turnaround times
cons: Pricing is a main point of friction especially as we are a small firm on a couple of down years. Big point here, PHOTO EDITING. The photo tool especially on the browser is very lacking. One minor misclick and the photo gets dragged to hell. Especially when trying to select the tools. Also I know it does not come out on the report but there is a small white line on 3 sides of the image in the editor that leads some Project Managers to believe that that the image is going to come out with that border. Some additional tools that I would reccomend are undo last edit (kind of the same as the section history tab) picture leveling/rotation that is not 90°, brighten/darken. Sometimes it's hard to take a picture in an attic when it's 130°F and you are crouching. Another suggestion to improve would be when the notification email gets sent out. Add a link to the report/ project folder within it. Saves maybe 30 seconds but I think it would be beneficial and hopefully does not take a lot of Dev time. You already include the full report name and ID.

description: Quire is an excellent template program. It makes my work life easier. My increased production has also paid off financially.
author: Richard C.
pros: Quire is extremely efficient. I am able to tailor the print, input, and library formatting easily. I am able to write my reports in 1/2 to 2/3 the time it took to use a WORD template.
cons: I have no issues with quire. If I have a problem a quick chat in their Quire Chat Support feature and my problems are always solved.

description: Over the past several years, our company went from somewhat reluctant adopters to enthusiastic Quire users. We started with one service line, but when others saw what Quire can do, they were quick to get on the train. We still have some holdouts, but eventually they will probably come around.
author: Chris E.
pros: Standardizes report template and format across a large company footprint. Quire has improved our report writing efficiency. Easy to use- if your users can use MS Word, they can use Quire. Multiple collaborators can work on the same report at the same time, if that's your thing. Great customer service/support. Issues are rare, but quickly addressed if they happen.
cons: User permission levels are not customizable WRT what each permission level can/can't do. You're stuck with the default permissions the system assigns, which are not ideal for all companies/users.

description: I use Quire every day to write Phase I's and Phase II's. It's super helpful and cuts down report writing time.
author: Maggie L.
pros: Quire is super easy to learn and very user friendly. I needed very little training to get started writing reports in the templates.
cons: I would love to use the camera option in the app when I do site visits. However, the camera is too zoomed in for me to use.

review_title: 10/10 Customer Service and Easy to Use!
description: I am happy that the company I work for uses Quire, it has made our report and proposal writing much simpler and save us a lot of time in the long run. The team at Quire goes above and beyond for their clients and it certainly shows, they are quick to respond and work on any trouble shooting that may be needed.
author: Kathryn O.
pros: I love that it is easy to use, the custom features, and the customer service. Quire makes report and proposal writing a breeze!
cons: The waiting period to generate a report if too many reports within the company are being generated simultaneously; however, that is a rare occasion and not something I would hold against Quire.

review_title: Great product and product team! Can't wait to see all of the benefits!
description: Very good experience with implementation and collaboration. The Quire team is easy to work with and very helpful throughout implementation. Customer support has been quick and responsive as well.
author: Tim R.
pros: The flexibility of the platform and potential for application is very large. There is clearly a lot of time and effort built into the backend of the product, and the implementation team has been quite good. I appreciate the pace and scope of coverage during the implementation.
cons: Like anything, the time to implement and the challenges with people spending the necessary time to become proficient in the software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I've written and edited hundreds of reports in Quire. It is my favorite platform!
author: Michael M.
pros: Quire is easy and fast to complete my reports.
cons: Some of the smart tables have quirky data entry requirements. Must have internet connectivity to use.

description: It has been a great experience to work alongside Quire. The staff is very helpful, and the platform is easy to use.
author: Valentina H.
pros: The easy to use platform that boost productivity, and helpful staff. Staff is super friendly, polite, and very responsive.
cons: The only drawback is wait time. Though the staff an experience is very helpful, the wait time to get another form installed is a drawback.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Quire has made my reporting much quicker, more organized, and streamlined. The support group works wonders whenever I have a formatting issue.
author: Erin W.
pros: It makes me feel very organized when doing my report. I can clearly see what I’ve done and what’s left to be done. I enjoy being able to quickly navigate between report sections.
cons: Currently, there are some nuances to the templates that are hard to understand. However, when I do have issues, a quick message to the support group usually solves all of my issues.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Keith R.
pros: The startup and integration with Quire was a smooth process. Since implementation, support has been outstanding. I really like the seamless integration of data report providers, map making tool and site photos tool.
cons: To no fault of Quire, getting all team members proficient using the software took a while.

description: Very positive experience, Quire reps and techs are very focused on the user experience.
author: Rachel H.
pros: Data loss- updates to text sections are made in real time, minimizing loss from infrequent manual saves. I've never had an issue with Quire losing work and the organization system is very intuitive
cons: Learning curve - takes a bit of time to adjust to the switch from other word processors

author: Anna J.
pros: User friendly and provides quality assurance for reports
cons: A little overwhelming to learn how to navigate the platform at first but the chat support system of Quire was very helpful

description: Great support, thanks [sensitive content hidden] at 9pm UK Friday.
author: Richard C.
pros: great chat support from [sensitive content hidden] - he sorted out my sync issue.
cons: Seems to be a bug uploading 50+ photos but fixed by logging out my mobile device then logging in again
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
